title: NimAgent project config
description: Top-level configuration for a NimAgent project (nimagent.config.json).

promptFile.description: Path (relative to project root) to the system prompt markdown file.

theme.description: Path to a theme JSON file (see themes/).

extensions.description: Extension JS modules to load. Each default-exports { name, tools, impl }.

skills.description: Skill directories. Each contains a SKILL.md with frontmatter (name, command, description).

autoDiscoverSkills.description: When true, auto-discover skill directories by scanning skills/**/SKILL.md.

registry.description: Base URL of the package registry. `nimagent install <name>` reads <registry>/registry.json and downloads from <registry>/downloads/.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers exposed through the `mcp` proxy tool. Keyed by server name. Also read from a project-local .mcp.json (which takes precedence).

directTools.description: true | string[] of tool names to register as first-class mcp__<server>__<tool> tools. Default: proxy-only.

idleTimeout.description: Minutes before an idle server disconnects (0 disables). Default 10.

directTools.description: Default directTools behavior for all servers (per-server overrides).

router.description: Intent router — classifies each turn as coding or assistant using a warm Python sidecar + local ML.

enabled.description: Activate the intent router. Default false.

mode.description: auto: classify every turn. manual: only change via /route.

default.description: Default persona when confidence is below threshold.

interpreter.description: Path to python executable or venv python.

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum confidence to accept a classification (0-1). Default 0.60.

timeoutMs.description: MS to wait for sidecar before falling back to JS heuristics. Default 150.

bridge.description: NimTools bridge — exposes the hermes capability set (browser, computer_use, media, memory, etc.) via a single nimtools proxy tool.

enabled.description: Register the nimtools proxy tool. Default false.

hermesRoot.description: Absolute path to the hermes-agent directory. Default C:\hermes-agent.

interpreter.description: Path to python executable (preferably hermes venv python).
